nodes.label: AI as emotional filter and clarity enhancer for communication
nodes.grounding_span: having AI to help proofread and rewrite to ensure messages are nice, concise, and easy to understand

nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI to help brainstorm has reduced time in brainstorming sessions

nodes.label: AI use for sensitive procedural documents
nodes.label_negative: Avoiding AI for sensitive documents due to security risk
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to risk having any information about my place of employment... in a repository

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it saves time when helping with messages and brainstorming

nodes.label: Maintaining core professional skills independent of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is essential to maintain those skills

nodes.label: Effective and considerate communication
nodes.grounding_span: I was left with an email that was nice, while also rejecting their request

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: reduced time in brainstorming sessions and helped free up time for other tasks

nodes.label: Professional competence and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: You need to be able to confidently perform your duties

nodes.label: Information security and confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to risk having any information about my place of employment... in a repository

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for crafting sensitive messages
nodes.grounding_span: I was extremely happy with the end result

nodes.label: Initial skepticism toward AI in meetings
nodes.grounding_span: At first, I didn't utilize AI and thought it was silly

nodes.label: Changed positive view after seeing colleagues' use
nodes.grounding_span: It wasn't until I saw how much time it saves... that I finally started to use it

nodes.label: Cautious avoidance of AI for sensitive documents
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do them on my own because I don't want to risk having any information... in a repository

nodes.label: Commitment to maintaining skills despite AI
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is essential to maintain those skills

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — back-and-forth co-creation
nodes.grounding_span: I go back and forth collaborating on the task until I have everything the way I want it

nodes.label: Security-conscious compartmentalization — sanitizing data before AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I alter my documents to create fictitious people and places before seeing help
